'''pagoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphoplasty|kyphoplasty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphoplasty|kyphoplasty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægeyeth|pægeyeth]] || [[word:pægeyej|pægeyej]] || [[word:pægeyesh|pægeyesh]] || [[word:pægeye|pægeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogoyoth|pagogoyoth]] || [[word:pagogoyoj|pagogoyoj]] || [[word:pagogoyosh|pagogoyosh]] || [[word:pagogoyo|pagogoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagoyoth|pagoyoth]] || [[word:pagoyoj|pagoyoj]] || [[word:pagoyosh|pagoyosh]] || [[word:pagoyo|pagoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofyoth|pagofyoth]] || [[word:pagofyoj|pagofyoj]] || [[word:pagofyosh|pagofyosh]] || [[word:pagofyof|pagofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagoyotho|pagoyotho]] || [[word:pagoyojo|pagoyojo]] || [[word:pagoyosho|pagoyosho]] || [[word:pagoyoko|pagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagoyoth|pagoyoth]] || [[word:pagoyoj|pagoyoj]] || [[word:pagoyosh|pagoyosh]] || [[word:pagoyo|pagoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagoyothol|pagoyothol]] || [[word:pagoyojol|pagoyojol]] || [[word:pagoyoshol|pagoyoshol]] || [[word:pagoyokol|pagoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagoyothotho|pagoyothotho]] || [[word:pagoyojojo|pagoyojojo]] || [[word:pagoyoshosho|pagoyoshosho]] || [[word:pagoyoko|pagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagoyothon|pagoyothon]] || [[word:pagoyojon|pagoyojon]] || [[word:pagoyoshon|pagoyoshon]] || [[word:pagoyokon|pagoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagoyothoro|pagoyothoro]] || [[word:pagoyojoro|pagoyojoro]] || [[word:pagoyoshoro|pagoyoshoro]] || [[word:pagoyokoro|pagoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
